description_long: This is a bolt-action military rifle with a long wooden stock and a blued steel barrel, featuring a fixed bayonet attached to the muzzle. The rifle has a classic straight stock design, a prominent bolt handle, and a leather or canvas sling attached for carrying. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with the wood stock extending nearly the full length of the barrel. The iron sights are visible, with a front post and a rear notch, typical of early to mid-20th-century service rifles. The bayonet is long and slender, mounted directly to the barrel, and can be detached as seen in some views. The overall finish is utilitarian, with a matte wood grain and dark metal components.
description: A classic bolt-action military rifle with a long wooden stock, blued steel barrel, fixed bayonet, and attached sling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metal barrel, attached bayonet, and sling.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the rifle and the bayonet detached and placed beside it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, bayonet, and the attachment points of the sling.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the rifle and bayonet, with the bolt handle and trigger guard visible.
